prompt:
Specify a notch RC network to suppress a narrow interference band on a measurement line. Frequencies below 2 kHz and above 4.13 kHz must be passed with <= 3.1 dB loss. The attenuation between 2.33 kHz and 3.79 kHz must be >= 33.9 dB. The design should use the fewest passive components that satisfy these requirements.

REQUIREMENTS:
  Type: notch filter
  Notch centre: 2.975 kHz
  Notch bandwidth (-3 dB): 2.335 kHz – 3.791 kHz
  Stopband sample (fs): 2.891 kHz  [min attenuation: 33.9 dB]
  Passband loss: ≤ 3.1 dB
netlist:
* Single-stage passive RC notch filter (Twin-T)
V1   VIN   0     AC 1

* Twin-T notch section(s)
* Twin-T stage 1 — resistive arm
RTA11  VIN      NTA1A    16.7k
RTA12  NTA1A    NTA1OUT  16.7k
CTA1S1 NTA1A    0        3.18n
CTA1S2 NTA1A    0        3.18n
* Twin-T stage 1 — capacitive arm
CTA11  VIN      NTA1B    3.18n
CTA12  NTA1B    NTA1OUT  3.18n
RTA1S1 NTA1B    0        16.7k
RTA1S2 NTA1B    0        16.7k
EOUT VOUT  0     NTA1OUT 0  1

RTA1S2 NTA1B    0        1.73k
EOUT VOUT  0     NTA1OUT 0  1

The insertion loss in the passbands below 58.4 Hz and above 519 Hz must stay below 2.3 dB. Between 156 Hz and 211 Hz, signal levels must be reduced by at least 24.1 dB. Ensure the filter behaviour is fully independent of the source; use as few components as possible.

REQUIREMENTS:
  Type: notch filter
  Notch centre: 181.6 Hz
  Notch bandwidth (-3 dB): 156.2 Hz – 211.2 Hz
  Stopband sample (fs): 165 Hz  [min attenuation: 24.1 dB]
  Passband loss: ≤ 2.3 dB
netlist:
* Single-stage passive RC notch filter (Twin-T) with input op-amp buffer
V1   VIN   0     AC 1

* Input buffer (ideal unity-gain voltage follower)
EBUF VBUF  0     VIN 0  1

* Twin-T notch section(s)
* Twin-T stage 1 — resistive arm
RTA11  VBUF     NTA1A    60.8k
RTA12  NTA1A    NTA1OUT  60.8k
CTA1S1 NTA1A    0        14.2n
CTA1S2 NTA1A    0        14.2n
* Twin-T stage 1 — capacitive arm
CTA11  VBUF     NTA1B    14.2n
CTA12  NTA1B    NTA1OUT  14.2n
RTA1S1 NTA1B    0        60.8k
RTA1S2 NTA1B    0        60.8k
EOUT VOUT  0     NTA1OUT 0  1

  Notch centre: 538.5 Hz
  Notch bandwidth (-3 dB): 457.1 Hz – 634.5 Hz
  Stopband sample (fs): 520.9 Hz  [min attenuation: 57.7 dB]
  Passband loss: ≤ 1.1 dB

EMID NMID  0     NTA1OUT 0  1

* Stage 2
* Twin-T stage 1 — resistive arm
RTB11  NMID     NTB1A    90.9k
RTB12  NTB1A    NTB1OUT  90.9k

CTB1S2 NTB1A    0        3.14n

The passbands span below 37.7 Hz and above 340 Hz with a maximum of 1.3 dB insertion loss. Between 82.1 Hz and 109 Hz, a minimum of 45.3 dB attenuation is required. The source must be decoupled from the RC chain; use the fewest stages that satisfy all constraints.

REQUIREMENTS:
  Type: notch filter
  Notch centre: 94.78 Hz
  Notch bandwidth (-3 dB): 82.13 Hz – 109.4 Hz
  Stopband sample (fs): 82.55 Hz  [min attenuation: 45.3 dB]
  Passband loss: ≤ 1.3 dB
netlist:
* 2-stage passive RC notch filter buffered (Twin-T)
V1   VIN   0     AC 1

* Input buffer (ideal unity-gain voltage follower)
EBUF VBUF  0     VIN 0  1

* Twin-T notch section(s)
* Twin-T stage 1 — resistive arm
RTA11  VBUF     NTA1A    54.3k
RTA12  NTA1A    NTA1OUT  54.3k
CTA1S1 NTA1A    0        30.9n
CTA1S2 NTA1A    0        30.9n
* Twin-T stage 1 — capacitive arm
CTA11  VBUF     NTA1B    30.9n
CTA12  NTA1B    NTA1OUT  30.9n
RTA1S1 NTA1B    0        54.3k
RTA1S2 NTA1B    0        54.3k

* Mid buffer to isolate stage 1 from stage 2
EMID NMID  0     NTA1OUT 0  1

* Stage 2
* Twin-T stage 1 — resistive arm
RTB11  NMID     NTB1A    54.3k
RTB12  NTB1A    NTB1OUT  54.3k
CTB1S1 NTB1A    0        30.9n
CTB1S2 NTB1A    0        30.9n
* Twin-T stage 1 — capacitive arm
CTB11  NMID     NTB1B    30.9n
CTB12  NTB1B    NTB1OUT  30.9n
RTB1S1 NTB1B    0        54.3k
RTB1S2 NTB1B    0        54.3k
EOUT VOUT  0     NTB1OUT 0  1
